narrative_text: The wagon crashes into a fountain in the market square. Cookies scatter everywhere on the wet ground. The boy is out of breath. A shopkeeper comes out and looks at the mess.
scene_description: Beyond the bridge, the path opens into a sunny clearing dominated by an old, round stone well. The boy stops his wagon as his dog discovers something glittering on the cobblestones. A bright blue bird watches the scene from its perch on a wooden bucket, while golden sunlight illuminates the shiny object.

properties.distinctive_features: thick brown curly hair and wide eyes

entities.pose: standing tall with legs slightly apart, holding the wagon handle firmly

properties.distinctive_features: long floppy ears and a wagging tail

entities.pose: crouching low with front paws extended and tail pointing upward

properties.distinctive_features: bright orange beak and tiny black eyes

entities.pose: perched upright with wings tucked tightly to its sides

properties.distinctive_features: long black handle and four sturdy wheels

entities.pose: resting flat with the handle angled toward the boy

properties.distinctive_features: dark chocolate chips and a white cloth cover

entities.pose: sitting still inside the woven basket

title: The Crash
